draft.subject: Partner with Florence SC Services — We Send You Customers
draft.body:
Hi Lou,

I'm Charlie with Florence SC Services. We connect homeowners and contractors in the Pee Dee region with reliable dumpster rental providers.

We're getting steady inquiries from people who need dumpster rentals, and I'm looking for a dependable local operator to send those leads to.

Would you be open to a quick call this week to see if it's a fit?

Best,
Charlie
Florence SC Services
charlie@florencescservices.com

draft.body:
Hi Lou,

Just circling back on my note from a few days ago. We have customers actively searching for dumpster rentals in your area.

Our model is simple — we send you qualified leads, you close the jobs. No upfront cost to get started.

Worth a 5-minute conversation?

Charlie
charlie@florencescservices.com
